title: senecio × helwingii
intro: Senecio × helwingii, commonly known as Jerusalem sage or Jacob's ladder, is a hybrid perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio × helwingii include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Senecio × helwingii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
